brands: Häagen Dazs,ฮาเก้น-ดาส,ฮาเก้นดาส

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients.text: Cocoa Flavoured Confectionery Coating With Roasted Almonds

ingredients_text: Vanilla Ice Cream (64,4%) (_Cream_ , Condensed Skimmed _Milk_, Water, Sugar, _Egg_ Yolk, Natural Vanilla Flavouring (0,3%)), Caramel Flavoured Sauce Layer (10,1 %) (Sugar, Water, Condensed Skimmed _Milk_, Glucose Syrup, _Butter_, Dried Glucose Syrup, Salt , Gelling Agent : Pectins (E440), Natural Vanilla Flavouring), Cocoa Flavoured Confectionery Coating With Roasted Almonds (25,5%) (Cocoa Butter, Sugar, Cocoa Mass Whole _Milk_ Powder, _Butter_ Oil, _Almonds_ (4,2%), Coconut Oil, Skimmed _Milk_ Powder, Emulsifier : _Soy_ Lecithin (E322), Natural vanilla Flavouring (0,3%), Safflower Oil)
